regulation_name: Act on Fair Labeling and Advertising (Pricing)
citation: Act on Fair Labeling and Advertising — Article 4
summary: Misleading price comparisons and false discount representations are restricted under fair advertising rules.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: Discount rate, sale price, or reference price claims. ACTION: WARN — verify prior price and promotion terms. CHECK: Reference price period and exclusions. ESCALATE IF: Inflated reference price or fake discount.
